summary: Staff engineer driving cross-team platform outcomes with $100M+ business impact.

bullets: Led inference platform redesign across 4 teams, reducing p99 latency by 40% and enabling 8 model launches in one quarter
Architected shared feature store adopted by 6 ML teams, saving $180K/year in redundant compute and cutting onboarding from 2 weeks to 2 days
Facilitated RFC process aligning research and infra orgs across 4 teams, completing 3 design reviews and achieving 6-month company-wide adoption of hybrid serving architecture
Built real-time ranking pipeline serving 2B+ daily requests, improving click-through rate by 12% via C++ optimization
Mentored 5 engineers through promotion cycles by designing stretch assignments and weekly architecture reviews

projects.name: Platform Reliability Framework
bullets: Created profiling framework trained 4 teams on adoption, reducing incident MTTR by 55% across 3 product orgs in 6 months
